title: QA Delivery Lead
description:
På Sogeti tror vi att det bästa finns inom var och en av oss. Genom vår gemensamma passion för teknologi, ai-drivna ansats, start-up-kultur och fokus på kontinuerligt lärande, ger vi dig förutsättningarna att nå din fulla potential och skapa värde för våra kunder. Med en stark drivkraft för kvalitet och agilitet stöttar vi dig genom hela din karriär så att du kan göra allt större avtryck och bli den bästa versionen av dig själv.


**Om rollen**

Som erbjudande- och leveransansvarig inom test och kvalitetssäkring kliver du rakt in i händelsernas centrum där affärsutveckling möter global leverans. Ditt uppdrag är tvådelat: du formar hur vi paketerar och säljer våra tjänster inom test och kvalitetssäkring, och du leder sedan arbetet med att göra dessa lösningar till verklighet ute hos våra kunder.  

  

  



Det här är rollen för dig som vill ha helhetsansvar – från den första idén på ritbordet till det färdiga resultatet i produktion.  

  

  



Du blir en del av vår Big Cities-satsning och kommer att vara stationerad i Malmö, Helsingborg, Göteborg eller Stockholm  

  

  

  



*I den här rollen spelar du en nyckelroll i att:*  

  



* Designa tjänster: Du analyserar var marknaden och tekniken är på väg (t.ex. inom testautomatisering och Quality Engineering) och paketerar det till tydliga erbjudanden som löser kundernas utmaningar.
* Vara säljstöd och strategi: Du agerar expertstöd till säljteamet. Du är med i kundmöten, formar lösningsförslag och sätter strategin för hur vi pitchar våra QA-tjänster.
* Orkestrera on- och offshore-resurser: Du sätter ihop rätt team för rätt uppdrag. Leveranserna sker oftast genom en mix av lokala konsulter (onshore) och våra internationella team (offshore). Din uppgift är att få dessa distribuerade team att fungera som en väloljad maskin.

Vara bryggan mellan kulturer och tidszoner: Du leder och koordinerar arbetet över gränserna, sätter upp effektiva samarbetsformer och säkerställer att kommunikationen mellan kunden och offshore-teamet är helt sömlös  
* 

**Din profil**


* Erfarenhet av QA/Test: Flera års erfarenhet av testledning, QA-arkitektur eller som konsult inom kvalitetssäkring.
* Global leveransvana: Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att arbeta med internationella leveransmodeller (onshore, nearshore eller offshore) och förmågan att leda team över kultur- och tidsgränser.
* Kommersiellt driv: Erfarenhet av att paketera tjänster, skriva offerter eller driva merförsäljning.

Kommunikativ förmåga: Du pratar och skriver obehindrat på både svenska och engelska, då rollen innebär daglig kontakt med internationella team och lokala kunder.  
* 

  

**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**


* Stort mandat och korta beslutsvägar: Du får en nyckelroll där du faktiskt kan påverka. Du formar erbjudandet från grunden och ser direkt resultatet av dina beslut i leveransen.
* Det bästa av två världar: Du trivs i gränssnittet mellan affär och teknik. Du slipper välja mellan att sitta i strategiska kundmöten eller att driva tekniska QA-leveranser – här gör du båda!
* En internationell vardag: Du motiveras av att arbeta i en global miljö. Att navigera mellan lokala kundbehov och internationella offshore-team ser du som en spännande och givande utmaning.

Kontinuerligt lärande: Eftersom du äger erbjudandet förväntas du hålla dig uppdaterad på de senaste trenderna inom Quality Engineering och testautomatisering, vilket ger dig konstant professionell utveckling.  
* 

**Ansökan**


*Just nu har vi semesterperiod och hoppas att även du njuter av en fin sommar. Vi ser framemot att läsa igenom din ansökan när vi är tillbaka från semester och förväntar oss att kunna återkoppla dig i augusti när vi är åter! Stort tack för ditt tålamod!*

title: Head of Go-To-Market (Data & AI)
description:
At Capgemini, you have the opportunity to shape your career in a way that fits your life, your goals, and your ambitions; supported by a collaborative team where knowledge sharing and continuous learning are part of everyday work. We believe in reimagining what’s possible and using technology to build a more sustainable and inclusive future. Our Data & AI team leads the way in this mission, delivering end-to-end Data & AI solutions across industries. With over 550 specialists in the Nordics and strong partnerships with Google, AWS, Microsoft, Databricks, and Snowflake, and more we scale next‑generation cloud Data & AI with impact. Here, your skills matter, your ideas matter, and your growth matters. Join us and be part of transforming industries with cutting-edge data innovation. We value diverse perspectives and know that innovation happens when people with different backgrounds and experiences come together. We actively encourage people from underrepresented groups in tech to apply.
  

  

Ready to elevate your career? We are now looking for our next Head of Go-To-Market & Larger Deals, Data & AI Sweden, where you will lead a talented team of people and be part of the Capgemini Sweden Data & AI Leadership Team.


**Your role**
-------------


As Head of Go-To-Market for Data and AI in Sweden, you will lead the Data & AI sales team, driving the development and execution of growth strategies in close collaboration with the Sweden leadership team. You will own the End-To-End Go-To-Market engine, oversee pipeline development, forecasting, and performance management, while shaping and closing large, complex deals. You will define market priorities, build robust business cases, and align industry-focused sales efforts with our portfolio and key partners. In addition, you will have the opportunity to contribute as an expert consultant in selected client engagements, providing hands-on support in delivery when relevant. You will also have the opportunity to collaborate with colleagues, clients, and teams across the Nordics and Europe.
  

  

*You will play a key role in:*  

  

**Strategic sales leadership & growth**


* Lead Data & AI GTM Team across Sweden in close collaboration with the Sweden MD
* Define and operationalize the Go-To-Market strategy (segmentation, value propositions, use cases)
* Qualify and pursue major opportunities, ensuring alignment with Business Lines and Data & AI offerings
* Drive pipeline growth, strategic deal wins, partner revenue, and market share

**Business development & client engagement**


* Build and maintain strong client relationships and external network
* Address complex client challenges and engage senior stakeholders
* Act as an expert consultant in selected client engagements, contributing to delivery through hands-on support when needed

**Deal execution & partnerships**


* Lead and orchestrate strategic deal shaping from qualification to closure
* Define and execute joint Go-To-Market strategies with partners (co-sell, co-innovation)
* Ensure strong Sales-to-Delivery transition including mobilisation and staffing

**Operations, performance & governance**


* Manage Go-To-Market operations, funnel tracking, reporting, and forecasting
* Ensure accurate forecasts and manage business development costs
* Design and implement performance management (KPIs)
* Support weekly, ad-hoc Sweden & Europe reporting
* Inspire high performance, build a strong sales culture, and act as a role model
**Your profile**
----------------


**Enterprise sales expertise & track record**


* Senior-level enterprise sales experience within Data & AI
* Proven track record of leading and closing large, complex transformation deals
* Strong experience in shaping advanced Data & AI services and solutions
* Passion for AI, data & analytics in an enterprise context

**Stakeholder management & influence**


* Strong ability to communicate and influence at senior business levels
* Proven capability to build and maintain relationships with key client stakeholders

**Market network & industry experience**


* Established client network within relevant industries
* Experience across horizontal business functions (e.g. finance, CX, procurement, HR, supply chain)
* Strong experience in at least two key sectors (e.g. Retail, Automotive, FS, Public Sector, etc.)

**Strategic advisory & solutioning capability**


* Ability to understand and shape complex client needs into Data & AI solutions
* Experience aligning solutions to client vision and transformation goals
**What we believe you will enjoy about working here**
-----------------------------------------------------


* A unique opportunity to shape Capgemini’s Data & AI growth agenda in Sweden, working closely with senior leadership and influencing some of the largest transformation programs in the market
* Freedom to finetune the role and be the best you can be, ensuring the success of Capgemini in a competitive market
* A culture shaped by Capgemini’s core values: Honesty, Boldness, Trust, Freedom, Team Spirit, Modesty, and Fun, where you actively contribute to bringing these values to life every day
* A comprehensive benefits package, including occupational and flexible pension schemes, private insurance, parental benefits, preventive healthcare and much more
  

  

We are primarily looking for candidates based in Stockholm, but we also welcome your application if you are located in Gothenburg or Malmö.


**Application**  

  

*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required. We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive workplace and welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, experiences and perspectives.*  

  

*Please note that, due to the* ***summer holiday period****, our response time may be slightly longer than usual. We appreciate your patience and look forward to getting back to you soon.*  

  

**About Capgemini**  

  

Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
  

  

**Make it real** | www.capgemini.com

title: Projektledare
description:
På Sogeti tror vi att det bästa finns inom var och en av oss. Genom vår gemensamma passion för teknologi, vår AI‑drivna ansats, entreprenöriella kultur och fokus på kontinuerligt lärande, ger vi dig förutsättningarna att nå din fulla potential och skapa värde för våra kunder. Med en stark drivkraft för kvalitet och agilitet stöttar vi dig genom hela din karriär så att du kan göra allt större avtryck och bli den bästa versionen av dig själv.


**Om rollen**


Som IT-projektledare arbetar du i konsultuppdrag där du driver projekt ute hos våra kunder och ansvarar för att skapa struktur, framdrift och resultat i komplexa IT-miljöer.


Rollen är placerad ibåde Linköping och Norrköping, där du tillsammans med kollegor verkar nära våra kunder i regionen.
Du ansvarar för att leda projekt från start till mål, ofta i organisationer med höga krav på kvalitet och leverans. Du är den som sätter riktning, skapar förutsättningar för teamet och säkerställer att leveransen håller tid, budget och kvalitet.


Rollen verkar i gränslandet mellan teknik, verksamhet och förändring, där tydlig kommunikation och förmågan att navigera komplexitet är avgörande. I den kontexten blir modern teknik, som agentisk AI och Gen AI, en naturlig del i att effektivisera arbetssätt och skapa värde. För dig innebär det att du ser möjligheterna i hur ny teknik kan användas i projekt och i kundens verksamhet.

  

  

*I den här rollen spelar du en nyckelroll i:*  

  

* Leda komplexa projekt ute hos kund, från initiering till leverans
* Säkerställa leverans av tid, kostnad, kvalitet och effekt
* Leda team och samordna intressenter, leverantörer och styrgrupp
* Driva kravarbete och skapa struktur i komplexa organisationer

* Du är van vid att arbeta nära styrgrupp och seniora beslutsfattare
* Du har erfarenhet av kravhantering och att omsätta verksamhetsbehov till IT-lösningar
* Du har erfarenhet av att arbeta i olika projektmodeller, exempelvis agila och traditionella

Förmåga att kommunicera obehindrat på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift  
* 

**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**


* Ett team där samarbete, innovation och balans är en naturlig del av hur vi arbetar – och där erfarenheter ,skratt och idéer delas öppet mellan kollegor
* Möjlighet att utvecklas kontinuerligt, genom uppdrag, egna initiativ och kunskapsdelning, med stöd av både lokala kollegor och Sogetis och Capgeminis globala nätverk

Uppdrag där du får ta ett tydligt ansvar och arbeta nära både kund och team, i en kultur som är familjär, inkluderande och stöttande i vardagen  
*

title: In-Country Service Delivery Manager
description:
Unilabs is implementing a Global Shared Services Centre (GSSC) to centralise core IT services while retaining essential in-country capabilities aligned to regulatory, business, and operational needs.


The In-Country Service Delivery Manager (ICSDM) is a key enabler of this operating model. The role is accountable for embedding global services into the country, completing operational run transfer, and ensuring a stable, high-quality end-to-end service for the business.


The ICSDM acts as the single authority in-market for IT service outcomes, serving as the bridge between the GSSC, global service towers, retained local services, suppliers, and business stakeholders.


The In-Country Service Delivery Manager is accountable for embedding the GSSC operating model within the market, ensuring stable service transition, strong local governance, and high-quality IT outcomes while acting as the bridge between global delivery and local business needs.


Scope of Global Services (Delivered via GSSC)


Following transformation, the GSSC will provide services across the following towers:

* Cloud & Hosting
* Networks
* End User Services
* Integration Services
* Service Management & Monitoring


The SDM is accountable for successful transition, adoption, and ongoing alignment of these services within the country.


Key Responsibilities


1. GSSC Service Transition & Run Transfer

* Accountable for the end-to-end transition of services from local delivery to the GSSC model.
* Acts as the primary conduit between in-country operations and global service delivery teams.
* Owns local operational acceptance, ensuring services meet security, regulatory, resilience, and business readiness requirements.
* Coordinates knowledge transfer, documentation, handover, and stabilisation activities.
* Leads change adoption with local IT teams and business stakeholders through structured communication and training.


2. Service Management & Performance Oversight

* Ensures services delivered by the GSSC meet agreed SLAs, XLAs, and business outcomes.
* Provides in-country oversight of incidents, service requests, changes, and escalations.
* Uses service data and reporting to identify trends, risks, and improvement opportunities.
* Drives continuous service improvement in partnership with global service owners.


3. Change & Release Management

* Governs centrally driven changes impacting the country, ensuring:


o Local impact and dependency assessment


o End-to-end risk mitigation


o Business readiness and communication

* Owns country-specific changes that interface with global services (e.g. cloud migrations, security controls).
* Ensures local knowledge is embedded into global change planning.


4. Incident, Major Incident & Problem Management

* Acts as in-country escalation owner for major and high-impact incidents.
* Coordinates with GSSC, global towers, and suppliers to minimise business disruption.
* Represents country impact during major incident calls and reviews.
* Ensures recurring issues are addressed via structured problem management and root-cause remediation.


5. Retained Local Services & Capabilities

* Manages services that remain outside GSSC scope, including:


o Local or regulatory applications


o Legacy platforms


o Market-specific integrations

* Ensures retained services comply with global security, architecture, and operational standards.
* Provides local input to global roadmaps and transformation priorities.


6. Supplier & Commercial Management

* Manages local suppliers, break-fix partners, and retained vendors in line with the target operating model.
* Monitors performance against KPIs and contractual obligations.
* Identifies opportunities for rationalisation, termination, or transition to global suppliers.
* Escalates risks and disputes early with clear resolution paths.
* Provides local requirements into global tenders, sourcing activities, and renewals.


7. Local Infrastructure & Data Centre Exit

* Supports the global strategy to exit local data centres and migrate services to cloud platforms.
* Manages local suppliers for systems not yet cloud-ready, ensuring stability and compliance.
* Maintains visibility of legacy risks and lifecycle constraints within the country.


8. In-Country Break/Fix & On-Site Support

* Manages local break-fix and on-site support arrangements.
* Ensures appropriate skills coverage, training, and handover as services transition to GSSC.
* Maintains user experience and operational continuity during and after change.


9. Leadership & Stakeholder Engagement

* Acts as the trusted IT service partner to the Market CIO and senior business stakeholders.
* Communicates service performance, risks, and change impacts in clear business terms.
* Leads local teams through transformation with clarity on roles and accountability.
* Promotes a One-Unilabs culture across local, global, and GSSC teams.

 **Requirements*** Proven experience leading IT service transition and operational transformation within multinational or shared-service environments.
* Strong background in IT service management (ITIL-aligned), including incident, change, problem, and supplier management.
* Experience managing transitions from local delivery models to global/shared service centres (GSSC).
* Ability to coordinate cross-functional stakeholders across local, regional, and global teams.
* Strong operational governance skills, including SLA/XLA oversight, escalation management, and continuous service improvement.
* Experience managing hybrid infrastructure environments, cloud migrations, and retained local services.
* Demonstrated ability to lead change adoption, communication, training, and business readiness activities.
* Strong vendor and commercial management capabilities, including KPI oversight and supplier performance management.
* Excellent leadership, stakeholder engagement, communication, and problem-solving skills.
* Analytical, resilient, and adaptable mindset within complex transformation programmes.
* Fluency in English and Swedish
* IT service management or leadership certifications considered advantageous.

title: Senior AI Systems Engineer
description:
###### **We're building the Operational Backbone for the next generation of Intelligent Systems.**

###### 
**Senior AI Systems Engineer**

Artificial Intelligence is changing how complex systems operate.


At TechSeed, we're building intelligent operational systems where AI, enterprise platforms, operational data and XR work together to support real-time decision making in industry, critical infrastructure and society.


We're not building isolated AI applications.


We're building the operational backbone behind the next generation of intelligent systems.


You'll join our **XR & Intelligent Systems** team, where you'll work alongside experienced specialists to design and build production-ready solutions that combine software engineering, AI and modern system architecture.

###### **What you'll do**

As a Senior AI Systems Engineer, you'll help design, build and scale intelligent operational systems where AI becomes part of real-world operations.


Examples of what you'll build include:

* AI-powered decision support
* LLM- and agent-based solutions
* AI integrated with enterprise platforms and operational data
* Real-time data pipelines
* Intelligent system architecture
* Digital Twin capabilities

You'll work closely with architects, software engineers and domain specialists across TechSeed to transform complex operational challenges into production-ready intelligent systems.

 **What you'll bring**  

  

We believe you'll recognize yourself in several of these areas:

* Strong software engineering background
* Python
* LLMs and modern AI frameworks
* RAG and AI agents
* Cloud platforms (Azure, AWS or GCP)
* APIs and distributed systems
* Docker, Kubernetes and CI/CD
* MLOps and production AI


Experience from industrial systems, embedded software, IoT or operational technology is an advantage, but curiosity, strong engineering skills and a passion for solving complex problems are even more important.

###### **Who you are**

* You enjoy solving difficult engineering challenges.
* You think in systems rather than isolated applications.
* You enjoy combining software engineering, architecture and AI to build solutions that create measurable business value.
* You're comfortable taking ownership, challenging ideas and collaborating with other senior specialists.
* Most importantly, you're motivated by building intelligent systems that solve real-world operational challenges.
* Due to the nature of many of our client engagements, professional proficiency in Swedish (spoken and written) is required.

###### **Why join us?**

* You'll become part of a growing specialist team focused on the future of intelligent operational systems.
* Working together with experts across AI, Cloud, Embedded Systems, Enterprise Integration and XR, you'll help shape solutions that support real-world operations—not just demonstrations.
* You'll have significant influence over architecture, technology choices and how we build our future AI capabilities.


If you're excited by building intelligent systems that create real-world impact, we'd love to hear from you.

title: SOC Engineer (Microsoft)
description:
**Om rollen:**

  

Är du passionerad för cybersäkerhet och ivrig att utveckla dina färdigheter inom en ledande internationell säkerhetsorganisation? Orange Cyberdefense söker motiverade SOC-ingenjörer – oavsett om du är i början av din karriär eller har viss erfarenhet – för att ansluta till vårt team. Detta är en fantastisk möjlighet att arbeta i en dynamisk Microsoft-miljö, där du stödjer kunder med hanterade säkerhetstjänster byggda på Microsoft Defender XDR-plattformen.


I denna roll kommer du att arbeta nära kunder för att proaktivt identifiera och minska cyberrisker, och du får värdefull praktisk erfarenhet av hotanalys, hantering av säkerhetspolicys och incidenthantering. Vi värdesätter både nya perspektiv och erfarna yrkesverksamma som är ivriga att utveckla sin expertis.

**Vad du kommer att arbeta med:**

* **Säkerhetsanalys & förbättring** – analysera kundernas Security Posture, identifiera sårbarheter och stödja riskbaserad prioritering
* **Attackvägshantering** – visualisera och analysera potentiell lateral rörelse inom kundmiljöer, och lära dig att rekommendera åtgärder för att förhindra attackkedjor
* **Policy- & konfigurationshantering** – hjälpa till att skapa, uppdatera och hantera säkerhetspolicys i Microsoft Defender XDR, Microsoft Intune och andra Microsoft-säkerhetsverktyg
* **Säkerhetsroadmaps & strategi** – bidra till att utveckla och underhålla förbättringsplaner i samarbete med kunder
* **Implementering & förändring** – stödja implementering av säkerhetsrekommendationer för att stärka kundernas miljöer
* **Övervakning & rapportering** – lära dig att övervaka plattforms-hälsa, säkerställa efterlevnad av säkerhetsbaslinjer och förbereda insiktsfulla rapporter om till exempel Microsoft Secure Score och riskbedömningar

**Vem vi söker:**

* Entusiastiska personer med viss erfarenhet eller stort intresse för Microsofts säkerhetslösningar, särskilt Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, Defender for Identity och Defender for Cloud Apps

**Intresserad av att utveckla din karriär inom cybersäkerhet?**  

Vi välkomnar ansökningar från både juniora och mer erfarna kandidater som är ivriga att lära sig, proaktiva och passionerade för säkerhet. Om du vill växa inom en Microsoft-miljö, ansök nu!

title: High-Accuracy GNSS Algorithms Engineer
description:
**Swift Navigation** is hiring. Swift is changing the way we navigate and understand the world. Swift's precise positioning technology platform improves location accuracy from several meters to centimeter-level and is used by millions of devices across the globe. Swift's technology is trusted by users across industries, enabling safer driving, improving efficiency for last-mile delivery and commercial transport operations, increasing accuracy for mobile devices and creating new possibilities for rail, robotics, and machine control. That's what we offer our customers and partners, but it's the work we do together as a team that is the best part of our days. We collaborate across the globe to tackle problems, to pursue our mission and to make a real impact in the world. We are diverse, flexible, supportive, and we believe our team is our most important asset and offer a host of benefits and programs to ensure that they know it.

  

Swift Navigation is looking for a High-accuracy GNSS Algorithms Engineer to join the team to work on the Skylark corrections engine. You will be working at the cutting edge of satellite navigation technology, designing and implementing advanced GNSS algorithms within Swift's correction service. You will provide technical leadership across the Skylark engineering group, set the bar for engineering excellence, and own the full lifecycle of features from problem definition and prototyping through implementation, verification, and release.



As a Staff Engineer at Swift, you will be fundamental to the company's success. You will turn complex problems into solutions that meet the goals of the business while maintaining alignment with the broader technical vision and Skylark architecture.

 **Duties & Responsibilities**


* Define, design, implement and document new features in Swift's GNSS corrections engine, with a focus on advanced user positioning algorithms (PPP/RTK), orbit/clock estimation and atmospheric modeling.
* Provide technical leadership on challenging, cross-cutting engineering projects spanning atmospheric modeling, correction generation, and message formatting.
* Take complex problems from target markets and customers and distill them into coherent technical strategies and execution plans.
* Drive clean software engineering practices through code reviews, design reviews, and architectural guidance to teammates and other Skylark teams.
* Act as a standard bearer for new technologies and techniques in GNSS positioning, balancing innovation against operational pragmatism.
* Proactively address technical debt and design systems for maximum utility across the Skylark product line.
* Collaborate with the team tech lead, PMs, and adjacent teams to ensure technical alignment across releases.
* Mentor engineers across the team, including senior ICs, and contribute to the development of the broader Skylark engineering group.

  


**Required Skills/Abilities**


* Strong background in GNSS positioning algorithms, ideally PPP, RTK, or SSR-based correction systems.
* Deep understanding of atmospheric effects on GNSS signals (ionosphere, troposphere) and approaches to model and mitigate them.
* Demonstrated technical leadership on large-scale projects delivered to production.
* Modern C++, with the ability to write clean, performant, well-tested code.
* Experience working iteratively with strong cross-functional communication across engineering, product, and customer-facing stakeholders.
* Git or equivalent version control systems, and modern software engineering practices (CI, code review, automated testing).

  


**Desired Skills/Experience**


* Hands-on experience with estimation techniques (Kalman/least-squares estimation, multi-kernel approaches, Gaussian processes).
* Scientific computing and signal processing fundamentals.
* Strong proficiency in Python for scientific analysis and algorithmic prototyping.
* Software architecture design at the service or system level.
* Cloud-based GNSS correction services and the operational constraints they bring.
* Open-source contribution and thought leadership in the GNSS or geospatial community.
* An enthusiastic, self-motivated approach to learning and exploring new technologies.

  



Swift Navigation is a diverse and inclusive team. We are an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds to apply regardless of race, ethnicity, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability status or other defining characteristics.

  

Swift Navigation will consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with the requirements of SFPC Art.49.

title: Kommunikatör till Skyddsvärnet - anno 1910
description:
**Om Skyddsvärnet - anno 1910**
-------------------------------


Skyddsvärnet är en idéburen organisation som sedan 1910 har arbetat för att människor ska få en andra chans. Genom våra verksamheter stöttar vi människor på vägen mot ett självständigt liv genom att förebygga social utslagning och skapar bättre förutsättningar för inkludering.


Nu söker vi en erfaren kommunikatör som vill ta ett helhetsansvar för vår kommunikation. Hos oss får du en nyckelroll där du både arbetar för att stärka vårt varumärke och synliggöra den samhällsnytta vi skapar varje dag.


Du blir vår kommunikationsexpert och arbetar nära verksamheten för att utveckla och förvalta organisationens kommunikation.

**Om tjänsten**
---------------


Som kommunikatör ansvarar du för Skyddsvärnets kommunikation. Rollen är bred, självständig och varierad där du ansvarar för allt från kommunikationsplaner till produktion av innehåll för våra digitala kanaler.


Du rapporterar till ekonomi- och kanslichef och samarbetar med chefer och medarbetare i hela organisationen.


Tjänsten är placerad på vårt huvudkontor på Barnhusgatan vid Hötorget i centrala Stockholm. Vi erbjuder möjlighet till hybridarbete cirka en dag i veckan.

**Dina arbetsuppgifter**
------------------------


I rollen kommer du bland annat att:

* Planera, producera och publicera innehåll för webbplats, intranät och sociala medier.
* Ansvara för och vidareutveckla Skyddsvärnets digitala kanaler och webbplats.
* Ta fram kommunikationsplaner samt utveckla organisationens interna och externa kommunikation.
* Producera tryck- och marknadsföringsmaterial i enlighet med vår grafiska profil.
* Skriva pressmeddelanden, arbetsannonser och annat kommunikationsmaterial.
* Planera, producera och samordna Skyddsvärnets verksamhetsberättelse.
* Ansvara för digitala utskick, nyhetsbrev och annan e-postkommunikation.
* Ansvara för organisationens fotobank och ta fram profilmaterial.
* Planera och genomföra digital annonsering.
* Planera och genomföra seminarier och webbinarier.
* Planera och sprida innehåll för vår podcast samt föreslå teman och gäster.
* Vara ett stöd till chefer och verksamheter i kommunikationsfrågor.
* Omvärldsbevaka relevanta frågor och trender inom kommunikation och våra verksamhetsområden.

**Vi söker dig som**
--------------------


Vi söker dig som är en trygg och erfaren kommunikatör med ett stort eget driv. Du är van att ta ansvar för hela kommunikationsprocessen och trivs i en roll med brett ansvar.


Du har:

* Akademisk examen inom media- och kommunikation eller motsvarande, alternativt likvärdig flerårig dokumenterad erfarenhet.
* Några års erfarenhet av kvalificerat kommunikationsarbete.
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska.
* Goda kunskaper i engelska.
* Erfarenhet av webbpublicering och digital kommunikation.
* Erfarenhet av sociala medier och digital annonsering.
* Goda kunskaper i Microsoft 365.
* Erfarenhet av Adobe Creative Cloud  

  

**Det är meriterande om du har**


	+ Erfarenhet av att arbeta i **Apsis**.
	+ Erfarenhet av att arbeta i **WordPress**.
	+ Erfarenhet av sökmotoroptimering (**SEO**) och sökmotormarknadsföring (**SEM**).


Som person är du:

* Självständig och initiativtagande.
* Strukturerad och kvalitetsmedveten.
* Kreativ med ett gott öga för form och språk.
* Relationsskapande och kommunikativ.
* Prestigelös och trivs med många kontaktytor.

**Vi erbjuder**
---------------


Hos Skyddsvärnet får du möjlighet att arbeta i en organisation där din kommunikation bidrar till verklig samhällsnytta. Vi erbjuder en självständig roll med stort ansvar och goda möjligheter att påverka hur vår kommunikation utvecklas framåt.


Vi erbjuder även:

* Fräscha och moderna lokaler på Barnhusgatan vid Hötorget.
* Hybridarbete med möjlighet att arbeta hemifrån cirka en dag per vecka.
* Friskvårdsbidrag på **5 000 kronor** per år.
* Kollektivavtal HVO (hälsa, vård och övrig omsorg), via Fremia.
* Facklig samverkan med organisationer som ingår i kollektivavtalet (SSR, Vision, Kommunal och vårdförbundet).
* Individuell lönesättning.
* Ett engagerat arbetsklimat med kollegor som varje dag arbetar för att göra skillnad.

**Anställning**
---------------

* Tillsvidareanställning med sex månaders provanställning.
* Heltid (100 %).
* Placering: Barnhusgatan, Stockholm.
* Tillträde enligt överenskommelse, gärna så snart som möjligt.
* Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer vi att begära utdrag ur misstanke- och belastningsregistret.

**Ansökan**
-----------


Välkommen med din ansökan senast den **17 augusti**.


Urval och intervjuer sker löpande, vilket innebär att tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag.


**Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!**

title: Senior Account Manager, Startup Sales - Europe North
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


From Bolt to Too Good To Go, the world's top startups, many of them now Enterprises, build on AWS. We offer the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform, offering over 200 fully featured services from data centers globally. Millions of customers - including the fastest-growing startups, largest enterprises, and leading government agencies - are using AWS to lower costs, become more agile, and innovate faster.  

  

The AWS Startup sales team in Stockholm is looking for a new team member who is passionate about enabling and developing technology startups. You will be at the heart of latest technology trends like Generative and Agentic AI, machine learning (ML), serverless or Internet-of-Things (IoT) to help your startups grow.  

  

Your startup customers leverage AWS to innovate and become the next unicorns and future enterprises.  

As an AWS Startup Account Manager, you will turn your deep expertise of the Nordics and Baltics markets to your advantage to win the most promising startups and scaleups for AWS. Working backwards from your customer’s priorities, you get to mobilize the full breadth of AWS capabilities to make an impact for your customers. Your tools of the trade will be the AWS services portfolio, best-in-class startup programs, and AWS’s co-selling mechanisms.  

  

This is a hunter role. You are expected to set your sights on the most important startups and scaleups not yet building on AWS, earn trust with them, deeply understand their businesses and challenges, design comprehensive strategies impacting all aspects of their business, and successfully migrate their cloud workloads to AWS. You should be able to communicate and act at all levels, from C-Suite to individual engineers. Your job will be to shape new realities for all stakeholders, empowering them to innovate and accelerate time-to-market. You will orchestrate deal teams to deliver results across internal and external stakeholders, such as the Solutions Architecture, Business Development, Partner, Training, and Support teams.  

  

You are passionate about technology startups, have excellent data skills, and intuition on finding the best Startups to support from Europe North, You have grit, are a self-starter with an entrepreneurial spirit who is prepared to work in a demanding environment, execute against ambitious goals and consistently embrace the Amazon Culture.  

  

AWS Global Sales drives adoption of the AWS cloud worldwide, enabling customers of all sizes to innovate and expand in the cloud. Our team empowers every customer to grow by providing tailored service, unmatched technology, and consistent support. We dive deep to understand each customer's unique challenges, then craft innovative solutions that accelerate their success. This customer-first approach is how we built the world's most adopted cloud. Join us and help us grow.
  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Identify, engage and migrate Nordics and Baltics startups to AWS
* Create and execute against comprehensive territory and account-level strategy to exceed your goals
* Facilitate long-term relationships from C-level to engineers, and industry experts, investor circles etc.
* Lead a team of cross-functional stakeholders both internally at AWS and externally with Partners
* Articulate compelling value propositions around AWS services and Amazon
* Represent AWS at conferences & marketing events
* Expect moderate travel

  

About the team  

Europe North startup team covers the 11 country area (Nordics, Baltics, Benelux) operating out of 2 hubs (Stockholm and Amsterdam) and 2 satellite offices (Helsinki and Copenhagen). The team is a diverse mix of experienced technology sellers, former founders, and startup ecosystem stakeholders (i.e. venture capital). The team consists of Account Managers, Solution Architects, Investor Managers, Partner Managers, Demand Generation Representatives, and Business Developers. We operate as one team to support the scale and go to market of startups in our region - from early stage (pre-seed) to scale up.
  

  

About AWS:  

Diverse Experiences
  

Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
  

  

Why AWS?  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Work/Life Balance
  

We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.
  

  

Inclusive Team Culture
  

AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.  

  

Mentorship and Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.  

  

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Minimum 6 years of relevant technology sales, business development or consulting experience
* Ability to build and deliver against a plan for your territory which meets or exceeds revenue targets
* Entrepreneurial “builder” mentality
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* Comfortable delivering results amid ambiguity and change

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------


- Startup work experience - founders preferred  

* Relevant advanced degree (e.g. MBA, MA, MS)
* Previous Cloud expertise at a technology company
* Business proficient in English and Swedish

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: evroc Talent community
description:
**Introducing evroc Talent community**


Some of the people who will shape Europe's digital future are still in university, early in their careers, or just getting started.


As evroc builds the next generation of cloud and AI infrastructure, we believe the conversation shouldn't only include experienced leaders and industry experts. It should also include the students, graduates, and early-career professionals who will help shape what comes next. That's why we created the evroc Talent Community. A curated community for ambitious individuals across Europe at the beginning of their careers who are curious, thoughtful, and eager to challenge conventional thinking.

**What is the evroc Talent Community?**


A community bringing together some of Europe's most promising students and early-career professionals interested in learning more about cloud, AI, and the infrastructure powering them. As a member, you'll gain access to:

* Exclusive events and meetups
* Technical sessions and hands-on workshops
* Career opportunities and early access to selected roles
* Networking with engineers, product leaders, and industry experts
* Insights into cloud, AI, infrastructure, and digital sovereignty
* Future graduate, internship, and early-career opportunities at evroc

**Who we're looking for**


We welcome applications from individuals across Europe who are at the beginning of their careers and share an interest in technology and innovation.


This community is particularly relevant for:

* Engineering students in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Cybersecurity, or related fields
* Recent graduates looking to build a career in technology
* Early-career professionals with up to a few years of experience


At evroc, diversity is our strength. We champion an inclusive environment where every background; ethnicity, age, gender identity, beliefs, and culture, is celebrated.

**How it works**


To ensure a highly engaged and valuable experience, we review every application and select a limited number of members. We're building a community of future builders, engineers, and innovators who want to learn, contribute, and grow together while helping shape Europe's technological future.


We're looking forward to connecting with the next generation of European technology talent.

title: Platform Engineer
description:
Build something monumental for Healthcare!
   

  

 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You love making systems work - not just in theory, but in production.
   

  

 You care about quality, performance, and reliability and you know that great infrastructure isn’t just about uptime, it’s about enabling everyone else to build faster, safer, and with more confidence.
   

  

 At Tandem, you’ll build and evolve the platform that underpins the future of European healthcare. The systems you build will ensure our citizens most sensitive data remains secure while powering the AI transformation of healthcare. Your work will be the foundation for supporting our continued rapid scale-out across the continent!
   

  

 You’ll be part of a small, highly skilled team that designs, builds, and maintains the infrastructure & core systems our products run on, from Kubernetes clusters and CI/CD pipelines to PHI handling and security. You’ll care deeply about how code moves from commit to production, and you’ll take pride in knowing that the systems you build are robust, observable, and elegant.
   

  

 If you’re the kind of engineer who feels a quiet satisfaction when
 *everything just works* 
 , who values precision, security, and clarity - this is your kind of role.
   

  

 What You Will Do
   

  

* Design, build, and maintain the cloud infrastructure that powers Tandem’s products.
* Build scalable systems on top of Kubernetes, enabling rapid and reliable product development.
* Develop and optimize CI/CD pipelines, ensuring smooth, automated, and secure deployments.
* Implement and manage robust encryption and key management systems to meet healthcare-grade security requirements.
* Ensure observability, monitoring, and alerting are baked into every layer of the stack.
* Continuously improve performance, reliability, and scalability - and validate it through testing and automation.
* Ensure our infra supports high speed of iteration despite a regulated industry.


 What You Bring
   

  

* Deep understanding of cloud infrastructure (Azure preferred, AWS/GCP also welcome).
* Strong experience with Kubernetes, CI/CD, and modern cloud tooling.
* Hands-on programming experience - you don’t just configure systems, you build them.
* Solid grasp of networking, security, and encryption concepts.
* A passion for building systems that empower developers and make complex things simple.
* High standards for quality, documentation, and correctness.
* A mindset that combines craftsmanship with pragmatism - you get things done right.
* Experience with Terraform, Helm, or infrastructure-as-code.


 Bonus Points
   

  

* Experience working in regulated industries (healthtech, finance, etc.). Especially with Medical Device Regulation.
* Background in software engineering before specializing in infrastructure.
* Contributions to open-source or platform-related communities.
* A history of building systems that scale - and stay up.


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

**Our Interview Process Consists Of 4 Stages**
* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineers
* Interview with our CTO & Co-Founder
* Home case and presentation at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch, and a presentation to experience our our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


 We're currently in the middle of vacation season, which means it may take us a little longer to review applications and get back to you. Thanks for your patience - we're looking forward to reading your application!
   

  

**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 30 days/year of paid vacation
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag) plus an additional 6,000 SEK yearly to spend on other health related initiatives
* Generous Parental leave top-up for new parents
* Private Medical Insurance to stay healthy
* Mental health support through our partner Mindler
* Pension program
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


*We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*
 Culture at Tandem
   

  

 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Product Engineer
description:
Build something monumental for Healthcare!
   

  

 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You love building products that truly delight at light speed. At your previous job you often felt impatient that your team’s next wave of improvements isn’t in your users' hands already. At Tandem you’ll be using that mindset to solve the problem that today clinicians are forced to work in systems that work against them rather than with them.
   

  

 As a Product Engineer at Tandem you’ll be shaping and building towards our product vision, working closely with designers, other engineers and our users. Owning and shipping features end to end, from understanding the user's pain-point through shipping it to clinicians all over Europe and polishing it to delight our users. You’re deeply technical, but ultimately, you’re motivated by crafting great products that solve real problems, and you’ll roll up your sleeves and get that done.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Own Product development end-to-end by defining product requirements, setting priorities, and translating ideas into technical specifications
* Partner directly with designers, users, and other engineers to shape and deliver impactful features.
* Design and implement scalable web applications using modern front-end and back-end technologies.
* Ensure applications provide an intuitive and seamless user experience, incorporating feedback from stakeholders and end-users.
* Maintain high standards of code quality through code reviews, testing, and documentation.
* Use the best modern tools to ship great features as fast as possible.


 What You Bring
   

  

* A strong product mindset with the ability to define, build, and ship impactful features end-to-end.
* Proven experience building and deploying production-grade  Python  systems.
* Strong programming skills in TypeScript and  React.
* Experience with cloud infrastructure and a focus on scalability and reliability
* A passion for technical excellence and a drive to deliver impactful solutions.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.


 Bonus Points
   

  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* Experience in the healthcare industry or with health-related applications
* Experience building Large Language Model (LLM) applications.
* Experience handling streaming audio and transcription.
* Experience with Kubernetes and Azure


 Location
   

  

 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

 How to Apply
   

  

 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

**Our Interview Process Consists Of 4 Stages**
* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineering team
* System Design Interview at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch and a Product focused System Design interview to experience our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.
* Follow-up interview with our CTO & Co-Founder


 We're currently in the middle of vacation season, which means it may take us a little longer to review applications and get back to you. Thanks for your patience - we're looking forward to reading your application!
   

  

**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 30 days/year of paid vacation
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag) plus an additional 6,000 SEK yearly to spend on other health related initiatives
* Generous Parental leave top-up for new parents
* Private Medical Insurance to stay healthy
* Mental health support through our partner Mindler
* Pension program
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


*We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*
 Culture at Tandem
   

  

 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Head of AI & Data Transformation
description:
*Vill du vara med och forma hur AI och data förändrar ett av världens mest avancerade teknik- och försvarsföretag? Vill du leda transformationen som gör AI och data till en naturlig del av affären, arbetssätten och beslutsfattandet i hela Saab? Det du gör spelar roll.*
 Din roll
   

  

 Saab söker en Head of AI & Data Transformation till en koncernövergripande organisation. Du får en strategisk ledarroll med ansvar för att accelerera Saabs AI- och datadrivna transformation genom att skapa förutsättningar för kompetensutveckling, förändringsledning och verksamhetsadoption i stor skala.
   

  

 AI och data är centrala möjliggörare för framtidens produkter, tjänster och affärsmodeller. För att realisera den fulla potentialen krävs inte bara teknikplattformar och lösningar, utan också en organisation som förstår, använder och vidareutvecklar dem. Som Head of AI & Data Transformation ansvarar du för att utveckla denna förmåga genom att etablera arbetssätt, kompetenser och strukturer som hjälper verksamheten att identifiera, prioritera och realisera värdet av AI och data.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära affärsområden, teknikorganisationer, produktledare och verksamhetschefer för att skapa en gemensam riktning för hur AI och data används för att leverera affärsnytta, effektivitet och operativ förmåga. Genom att främja användningen av gemensamma plattformar, standardiserade arbetssätt och beprövade lösningar möjliggör du innovation som är skalbar, säker och återanvändbar över hela koncernen.
   

  

 Detta är en unik möjlighet att påverka hur en av Europas ledande försvars- och säkerhetskoncerner omsätter AI och data till konkret verksamhetsvärde.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du bland annat att:
   

  

* definiera och driva Saabs strategi för AI- och datatransformation
* utveckla kompetens, arbetssätt och styrning som stärker organisationens förmåga att använda AI och data
* stödja verksamheten i att identifiera, prioritera och realisera affärsvärde genom AI och data
* leda samarbetet med affärsområden och ledningsgrupper för att accelerera den datadrivna transformationen
* säkerställa att AI-initiativ genomförs på ett ansvarsfullt, säkert och affärsmässigt sätt


 Din profil
   

  

 Vi söker dig som kombinerar strategiskt ledarskap med en förmåga att omsätta ny teknik till verklig verksamhetsförändring. Du förstår att framgångsrik AI- och datatransformation handlar lika mycket om människor, kultur och förändring som om teknik. Du har erfarenhet av att leda komplexa transformationsinitiativ där nya arbetssätt, kompetenser och digitala förmågor etablerats i större organisationer.
   

  

 Du är en ledare som skapar engagemang, bygger förtroende och samlar människor kring en gemensam vision. Vi tror att du har erfarenhet inom flera av följande områden:
   

  

* förändringsledning och transformationsarbete i större organisationer
* AI-, data- eller digital transformation
* kompetensutveckling och organisatorisk förmågeuppbyggnad
* verksamhetsutveckling genom teknik, innovation och datadrivna arbetssätt
* samarbete med seniora ledare och verksamhetsansvariga


 Vi värdesätter särskilt din förmåga att kombinera strategiskt tänkande med ett pragmatiskt genomförandefokus. Du är skicklig på att bygga relationer, skapa engagemang och omsätta strategiska initiativ till konkret verksamhetsnytta. Du drivs av att se hur nya arbetssätt och teknologier skapar mätbara resultat för verksamheten. Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av:
   

  

* AI-strategi, AI-governance eller ansvarsfull AI
* generativ AI och storskaliga AI-initiativ
* produkt- eller plattformsorganisationer
* datadriven verksamhetsutveckling
* kompetensstrategier, lärandeorganisationer eller communities of practice
* säkerhetskritiska verksamheter inom exempelvis försvar, industri eller fordonsindustri


 Vi förstår att ingen kandidat kommer att uppfylla alla önskemål ovan. Om du känner igen dig i rollen och tror att du kan bidra till vår resa ser vi gärna att du skickar in en ansökan, även om du inte uppfyller samtliga kriterier.
   

  

 Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.
   

  

 Vad du blir en del av
   

  

 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med syfte att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidra till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 28 000 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga.
   

  

 Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
